claim_text: GENIUS Act signed into law and creates a federal payment stablecoin framework.
what_it_can_support: regime-change event and regulatory source trail
what_it_cannot_support: issuer profitability adoption or token volume growth
workflow_lesson: Legal event is not an investment thesis by itself.

claim_text: Statute and proposed rules define eligible issuer categories and supervisory requirements.
what_it_can_support: who can issue and under what supervisory path
next_evidence_needed: final rules approvals enforcement and licensing outcomes
workflow_lesson: Regulation changes possible market structure but not winner identity.

claim_text: Payment stablecoins require high-quality reserve backing under the framework.
what_it_can_support: reserve asset constraint and consumer-protection framing
what_it_cannot_support: spread economics without rate and cost assumptions
next_evidence_needed: final reserve rules reserve disclosure asset mix
workflow_lesson: Reserve safety can lower risk while also constraining economics.

claim_text: Issuer economics depend on circulation reserve yield distribution costs compliance costs and revenue share.
what_it_cannot_support: conclusion about CRCL or banks without numbers
next_evidence_needed: USDC circulation reserve income revenue-share cost structure rate scenario
workflow_lesson: Economics bridge is required before actionability.

claim_text: Regulated stablecoin status may improve distribution access through banks fintechs and payment platforms.
what_it_cannot_support: actual adoption or network effect proof
next_evidence_needed: bank partnerships payment volume merchant adoption wallet integration
workflow_lesson: Access possibility must be separated from realized usage.

claim_text: Banks and nonbanks may compete or partner under permitted issuer rules.
next_evidence_needed: charter approvals issuer applications bank product launches
workflow_lesson: Regime map should precede company thesis.

claim_text: Issuer reserve income is sensitive to short rates and reserve balances.
next_evidence_needed: rate curve reserve balance duration revenue-share terms
workflow_lesson: Financial plumbing needs rate sensitivity, not just volume growth.

claim_text: Current validation package lacks independent valuation consensus and market-implied expectations for stablecoin exposed equities.
next_evidence_needed: consensus estimates valuation multiples target revisions options/flow data
workflow_lesson: Do not use regulatory facts as priced-in analysis.
